title: Release readiness gate
task: Prepare a documentation-focused patch release after the branch is implemented.
context: The branch needs validation evidence, release notes, a clean commit boundary, and a tagged release.

route.path: Release / Final gate > Docs patch > Tag and publish
route.reason: Release readiness owns the gate, commit work keeps history reviewable, and QA preserves verification evidence.

omitted_skills.reason: There is no database runtime change.
The release process is the primary concern, not a new interface design.
